name: Maria Lopez
summary: Compassionate home caregiver with about three years of experience supporting elderly and disabled clients with their daily living activities. Bilingual in English and Spanish.

responsibilities: Assist two elderly clients with bathing, dressing, and grooming
Help with mobility, including transfers from bed to wheelchair
Prepared food orders in a fast-paced kitchen

education: Austin Community College - some coursework in nursing assistance
other_relevant: Comfortable working with clients who primarily speak Spanish
